summary: The chapter opens with a floor collapsing, setting an urgent tone for the protagonist, Mr. Ha-Jin. Ha-Jin successfully executes a mission to incapacitate his target, Tomer, by deploying a sleep-inducing smoke through the building's vents. Following this, he discovers a powerful relic box and encounters Rachel, who is in a distressed state after being attacked by a Mage. Rachel entrusts Ha-Jin with the relic box, asking him to take it upstairs due to his speed. The chapter concludes as Ha-Jin faces a new threat from an opposing six-person team, with an unnamed ally stepping in to buy him crucial time.
key_moments: Mr. Ha-Jin successfully incapacitates his target, Tomer, using sleep-inducing smoke delivered through the building's vents.
Ha-Jin discovers a powerful relic box and encounters a distressed Rachel, who requests he transport the box upstairs after revealing she was attacked by a Mage.
The chapter ends with Ha-Jin confronted by an opposing six-person team, while an ally steps in to buy him time.
